## Czym jest Zephyr
SaaS do tworzenia newsletterГѓВіw HTML dla agencji obsГ…В‚ugujГ„В…cych wielu klientГѓВіw.

## Repo
GitHub: <<ZEPHYR_REPO>>
Vercel: https://vercel.com/arturdab/zephyr

## Stack
Next.js 14 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v3 + Shadcn/ui
Railway PostgreSQL + Auth.js + Drizzle ORM + Vercel

## Struktura
src/app/(app)/          ГўВЂВ“ widoki aplikacji
src/app/(auth)/         ГўВЂВ“ login, register (Auth.js)
src/modules/zephyr/       ГўВЂВ“ hooki i typy (z Atomic UI)
src/lib/auth.ts         ГўВЂВ“ konfiguracja Auth.js
src/lib/db.ts           ГўВЂВ“ Drizzle ORM + Railway PostgreSQL
src/lib/ai.ts           ГўВЂВ“ wywoГ…В‚ania Anthropic API

## Zmienne Г…В›rodowiskowe
DATABASE_URL                ГўВЂВ“ postgresql://postgres:cTNWyYDudkuoVzSizmABtcmLdCWgUJSU@postgres.railway.internal:5432/railway
AUTH_SECRET                 ГўВЂВ“ generuj: openssl rand -base64 32
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY           ГўВЂВ“ <<ANTHROPIC_KEY>>
RAILWAY_BUCKET_ENDPOINT     ГўВЂВ“ <<ZEPHYR_S3_ENDPOINT>>
RAILWAY_BUCKET_ACCESS_KEY   ГўВЂВ“ <<ZEPHYR_S3_ACCESS>>
RAILWAY_BUCKET_SECRET_KEY   ГўВЂВ“ <<ZEPHYR_S3_SECRET>>
RAILWAY_BUCKET_NAME         ГўВЂВ“ zephyr-images

## Workflow sesji
git clone https://OWNER:<<ZEPHYR_TOKEN>>@github.com/OWNER/zephyr.git /tmp/zephyr
git config user.email "claude@anthropic.com" && git config user.name "Claude"
cd /tmp/zephyr && npm run build
git add -A && git commit -m "feat/fix: opis" && git push origin main

## Zasady
- h-14 dla wszystkich nagГ…В‚ГѓВіwkГѓВіw pierwszego rzГ„В™du (NIEPODWAГ…В»ALNE)
- CSS variables, nigdy hardkodowane kolory
- npm run build przed kaГ…Вјdym push ГўВЂВ“ zero bГ…В‚Г„В™dГѓВіw TypeScript

## Makiety
https://atomic-ui-sandy.vercel.app/projects/zephyr"}
